milestones.title: Core physics engine
milestones.spec: constants.js: VEHICLE_MASS, WHEELBASE, G, FRICTION (DRY,WET,SNOW,ICE). tire.js: calculateTireForce(slip, road). vehicle.js: Vehicle with v, a, update(dt). Tests: ESM imports, tire peak ~slip 0.2.

milestones.title: ABS algorithm
milestones.spec: calculateSlipRatio, THRESHOLD_MIN/MAX, Modulator FAST_CYCLE ~20Hz, ABSController + Wheel. Tests: slip, threshold, cycling, activation.

milestones.title: Telemetry and chart data
milestones.spec: SimulationHistory record/getSeries (max 500), toLineSeries -> [{x,y}], buildDashboard -> chart objects. NO DOM.

milestones.title: Integrated simulation
milestones.spec: AppState, Simulation.tick(dt), runTicks(sim,n,dt). Tests in test() blocks: brake reduces speed, ABS can activate, history records.
